scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:local-ui

scripts.test:core: npm run test:syntax && npm run test:ui-boundaries && npm run test:state && npm run test:deid && npm run test:clinical-guard-vocabulary && npm run test:section-redaction-incremental && npm run test:prompts && npm run test:progress-note-packet && npm run test:workups && npm run test:ui-features && npm run test:workup-systems && npm run test:workup-libraries && npm run test:workup-mirror && npm run test:openai-workup && npm run test:checklist-openevidence-import && npm run test:openai-checklist && npm run test:checklist-answers-summary && npm run test:openevidence-exam-note && npm run test:exam-findings-token && npm run test:exam-findings-controller && npm run test:custom-prompt-tasks && npm run test:guideline-sets && npm run test:prompt-preview-segments && npm run test:deid-model-options && npm run test:model-packs
scripts.build:clinical-guard-full: npm run build:mesh-vocabulary && npm run build:clinical-guard-vocabulary && npm run apply:clinical-guard-vocabulary
